All members of the crew were friendly and happy to answer any questions I had.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason Whyte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk52pebZGQyW-_dkfb7YLQMdqshA4XGD-eo1FQUYEaL8bt_A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can't thank ajax roofing and repairs enough. I had a leak coming my through my bathroom fan. I contacted a "roofer to come and have a look. He said everything seemed to be find and could just be condinsesation. Leak continued and hot worse. Called another "roofer" to come have a look and see if he could figure it out. He went on my roof said everything was fine. He then went into my attic and said everything was fine and couldn't see how it coukd leak. Still, the leak persisted. I contacted ajax roofing to come have a look. Brad came here, went on my roof, went in the attic and immediately knew why it was leaking. He explained everything in great detail. Following the completion of the project Mathew sent a number of pictures to demonstrate the quality of their work. Job well done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MWS FILMSERVICES Corp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt3QtOAZZnDG3RGW4Dmu8J0BDly_nKz8ExxTq98dsYCOHK9jg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We'd like to share a short note about MINT Roofing, the assistance they offered and the work they did for us.
In 2018, our 8 year old home lost quite a number of shingles during a windstorm. Several of our neighbours were in the same situation. They elected to have their roofs patched but not replaced. We felt unwilling to 'sweat every windstorm' that might come along. And so we began to interview roofers and decided upon MINT.
Everyone we met presented themselves as professional and knowledgeable. Owner Chris was generous with his time and expertise. Our home was shingled in two days, underlayment was applied, vents were upgraded and we even had sun tunnels installed. The shingles were warrantied for 50 years. Such a relief to not worry about when next they might fly!
However, around 2022 we began to notice a colour change on large swatches of our shingles. We spent the next year or so questioning whether or not we had a problem (!) Late in 2023 we called Chris and told him our thoughts. Within a week he was out to look at our roof. He then called in the shingle manufacturer's Ontario Liaison. Both men agreed that something was amiss - and that we should submit a warranty claim. Chris and Mike shepherded us through the process (forms to be completed, samples to be taken and sent). After several months our claim was verified as valid and the company underwrote the entire replacement of our singles. Again, it took 2 days to have an entirely new roof. The work was done professionally, as before and we are more than pleased.
One small event occurred wherein a delivery vehicle leaked oil on several spots on our driveway. We did not not notice it right away but in fact the roofers did and reported it to their office.  The company responsible did not step up to help mitigate the problem...but MINT Roofing took it upon themselves to have our drive resealed with a protective coating at their own expense.

What can we say? This company is truly a gem. We thank each of  them for the way in which they conduct themselves, for their professionalism and friendliness. Thank you Chris and all those we met or have spoken with.
Michael and Anne W.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Nishant Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiKpquwmiJEJpUin01WuowZXpHKqs4RlrrUJXk24vptDbEYf04=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got our roof replacement done by Durham roofing (Mike & his team) around mid-April 2023. We had initially contacted Mike in Jan-2023. Due to high winds, 1 of our roof soffit fascia metal strip had been damaged & flown off, leaving a gap & exposed the wood. Due to bad weather, snow etc, we were worried if snow / ice / water, went in, further damage will be done on the inside of attic. Mike responded promptly and we discussed the cost of fixing the issue (by exchanging the damaged area pics), his quote was very reasonable and thanks to Mike, we didn't have to defer fixing the exposed fascia till spring or summer. When Mike came to do the work, he also inspected our roof and told us that there were rotted plywood underneath in some areas and we should get the roof replaced soon. So we told him that this was already on our "to-do" list and we decided to circle back in April & get it done. Mike gave us a 3-day window in mid-April when the weather was OK enough to proceed with the work. His crew arrived on time and finished the work in 3-days. They made sure all the debris upon removal of the old roof was gone & Mike also provided me pics of the damaged area of the ply-board on both front & back side , which they replaced. Although not required, but I went with full ice & water shield under the certainteed shingles, so I am expecting them to last long. I would highly recommend Mike & Durham roofing for all your roofing repair & replacement needs. They are reliable / cost effective & professional. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxz46WWg&fid=0x0:0xb8c0004d41d48c42"],"When":"2023-5-29"},{"Name":"MS D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsTuJ1VpqqlwBhZfAf7YqSrTHYS81IGeu-s2GHGs0tTWC1x5BU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got one of the roof vent replaced. Mike is professional and super fast in his work. I would recommend Durham Region Roofing for any roofing services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2fJFj7aAGxf9IuiEn73bXeS3m4aIjAHTSJdnSqa9GYzLcR7HL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You can't put a price on peace of mind.

We had Mike and his crew out in autumn 2024 to replace the roof we had installed by another company in 2023.

In stark contrast to Alpha Roofing, Mike and his crew actually took care of our largest investment, and took pride in their work. If we could do it over again, I wouldn't even bother getting quotes from another company, I would just go straight to Mike.

Mike and his team took their time and did the job right. He kept us informed of his progress all the way through, but more importantly, they were transparent about process, the issues they uncovered along the way and how they were fixing/addressing them.

As I mentioned, the previous company we hired (Alpha Roofing) compromised the integrity of our home. We had 20+ exposed nails, no starter shingles, no snow/ice membrane and improperly installed shingles (all of which void the shingle warranty and would nullify any insurance claims related to roof, like water damage).

Mike took photos of everything for us–all the shortcuts, problems and areas of concern. He walked us through it all and explained how to do it properly. He fixed our roof and helped us with our claim. A real class act.

I can confidently say that Mike might be the best money you can spend on your home, because I know what it looks like to pay the wrong people. It's hard to articulate the peace of mind we've enjoyed since Durham Roofing helped us out.

And, as a real testament to their quality of their work, we live right on the lake, we get high winds and tons of exposure to the elements–unbelievable snow and rain storms–and their roof has stood up to it all. It's a masterclass in roofing, and I'm glad we Durham Roofing around to helps us.

Mike is your guy. Spend the money and sleep well.

(I'll try and pop back and add photos to this review in the spring, when all the snow has melted.)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Connie Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPZDgMUj4-mro3IEyjEK9FGBGwYraW554h4dXMMfmC8UGTExLhyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I HIGHLY RECOMMEND Durham Region Roofing.  Mike saved me from being scammed by another company, going way ABOVE AND BEYOND, before I had even contracted with him.  He is a person with a strong moral code to do the right thing, regardless of whether he benefits or not.
After helping me out of the mess I landed myself in, his crew came in and finished the job.  Their work was excellent, they were efficient and they did an excellent clean up job. He used quality materials and provided an excellent warranty on the shingles and workmanship.
If you are looking for a company you can TRUST, is FAIR IN PRICING, and DEPENDABLE, I recommend Durham Region Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tanya Najjar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkbpw6BYJvhalQqHSgnuivAMuxT7wCN-twZT_WwQf5K33r9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just had our roof and skylight replaced by Mike and his team and the whole process was seamless! title: ACCL Waterproofing
address: 124 Wilson Rd S, Oshawa, ON L1H 6C1
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Indira R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIi2kfWDjjGQ2ttTd1T3LBqTQ4-tUaErh8Cy1f9VvOs2qbVtmHUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"HOMEOWNER'S BEWARE

In 2018, I experienced a basement leak, which was identified specifically by my front stairs, and basement side entrance.

I reached out to ACCL waterproofing, Henry came by to assess the situation and provided a quote . We agreed to waterproof/wrap 2 sides of the basement. Cost was $16,500.00 and change.

I cannot say the transaction was smooth, in the sense that as soon as the contract was signed, I did not see Henry back back again. He did  not do daily inspection of his men's work. My yard was  littered with coffee cups, coke cans, plastic wrappers etc. from his workmen. I complained and eventually it was cleared up.

Upon completion of the job, I realized they had busted up the concrete of the basement wall on the outside by the basement window, as they tried to staple the rubber membrane to the wall. While this can be expected, due to the nature of the fix, I expected them to plaster up all such damage. ACCL waterproofing did not see it this way, so I refused to pay off the balance. Only then, they sent help out to fix this, but not before the person who answers the phone threatened me - she will send Mr. Henry out to visit me - Mr. Henry is an over 6ft, black guy and to some this can be an intimidating presence to recon with.

Fast track to few weeks ago, after our back to back snow storm and rains, I realize my basement was again leaking EXACTLY in one of the same places as before, which is the side door entrance.

Henry came out to assess the situation, and promptly said my side door was too low causing the water to go under the door and into the basement.

I said NO, the side door has always been this low, this is not the issue! Water was flowing over the cobble stone of the car port, and puddling by the basement door. The water was then seeping through the sand, through the membrane  and wall, then down into the basement the same way it did before. Henry then proceeded to send me a quote of $3500.00 plus to fix his oversight.

Water proofing a basement means regardless of where the water came from at ground level, it should NOT be able to get into your basement. Period! So whether there is rain, melted snow or otherwise the side entrance leak should have been properly addressed to avoid ANY water going into the basement again. The water was NOT flowing under the door, look at the close up photo, where the rubber membrane under the door, was not sealed properly and the water was steeping down and into the basement.

I even offer to ACCL water-proofing, that if there is raw material cost involved at this point to fix this issue once and for all, I am willing to cover that, if the amount is reasonable, and that his company should cover labor. He insisted, the only way he will fix this is if I pay the quote amount. We went back and forth, he went into bullying tactics again, even phoning me in an intimidating manner, and stalking me on Linknd, until I said I will pursue matters legally.

I called around to few companies, and one plumbing company came out to assess the job, his exact words are "I know ACCL water proofing...they can do neat work, BUT I've had many customers call me afterwards to address concerns ACCL has caused. They may not have the expertise to do these jobs properly and thoroughly"

You are welcome to retain this company to do your job - at your own risk and safety!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCoosuJBA&fid=0x0:0x31b28a47f5a87490"],"When":"2025-4-15"},{"Name":"Health2 Wealth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWX-GZ1oXaUlCz4hfakkYC03h9i7Qp9tW06E0a1Za-J5aSB7qEn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"ACCL Basement foundation waterproofing, we're very professional and efficient when the crew lead by Richard excavated and fixed multiple cracks on my Foundation. They also replaced my sump pump and took their time to adjust my sump pit. They are simply the best. Thanks guys.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chinemerem emmanuella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLWmXN173qcvi0uZK-Xwvs_OcK-4ZNu01pzal5-k_w3Iso7hg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently hired ACCL Waterproofing to tackle a pesky foundation issue in my home, and I couldn't be happier with the results! Any suggestions on how to get in contact?\nI need to buy materials for a small addition as it has to match their existing roofing material.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patrick Morrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxS-7Q5aCIuEIFTydRIvFaPkJWNKtYUeCvFSV-BiSsDZElOg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I moved into a home with a metal roof installed by this company that was done around 2014 by a prior owner. The company advertises their product and workmanship as \"your last roof\" and that it has a 50 year warranty. What they don't advertise is that they will not honor the warranty (if not transferred in 30 days) or workmanship (no transfer whatsoever) if the home is sold. Fast forward to today and I have a leaky roof in one corner of the house, less than 10 years later. After messaging the company and providing video showing where the leak was, they wanted to charge me ~$300 just to look at it, including a $1/km charge for travel to my location and back, even though I am well within their service area. This quote only came across after waiting nearly 2 weeks for the owner to reply. After trying to negotiate the quoted travel expense, which I found unreasonable, I was basically told to find another contractor and they dont negotiate. All this after their own poor workmanship. The company obviously does not care about their product or reputation and I would personally advise you to look elsewhere for such a major investment in your home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joel Myslik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE49KRcobspx2PfZIi8g_QJpdliEHdSHkAWTd4wZmdGSIkP3-knA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Craig and his entire crew are superb at what they do.\nExcellent customer service, very reasonable rates and a good selection of metal shingle profiles. A big concern for me was that I was about to put my condo up for sale and I was concerned that the flooding would make it hard to sell my condo.
Tony wrote up a detailed report for me and the Condo Board explaining everything. He charged me a very reasonable rate. I also gave a copy to my real estate agent in case concerns were raised.
As a single woman, I have been dealing with contractors for years, and I often find that they treat me in a condescending way. Tony was friendly, knowledgeable, and respectful. It was a pleasure to deal with him and I completely trusted his opinion.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Young and eager guys just starting out on their own. I respect young guys hustling to make something of themselves which is why I hired them. However they have a lot to learn about customer service and guaranteeing their installations.

They didn’t finish my work, leaving an entire section unfinished even though we verbally agreed on it. After requesting to finish they never returned. They installed H channel horizontally on an angle (bowing hard) and ignored my request to repair it. You stand back and the house looks ridiculous.

Their soffit blew out from strong winds in less than 6 months. I closely inspected it and the entire J channel ripped out. They screwed directly into exterior gypsum board which is not strong enough without properly preparing the substrate or using better anchors. The original soffit was there for 50+ years without issues. Hmmm.

Tony denied any responsibility, claiming that someone had intentionally gone up there or an animal ripped it out . No offer to inspect it and confirm or even consider it may be an installation error. He quickly informed me that if have to pay for the repair.

I own a service business for 20 years and I have learned that taking care of your customers goes a long way, even if it costs you money to do so. In fact it’s the only way to maintain long the customers and a solid reputation. This is something they may learn the hard way.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Louie Doulias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUUUTEaJ6hPFS1997t2oO9e61fwCBa8M7tkchBDEz7gi450uh51Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These guys came to Winnipeg to do our eaves. I highly recommend Cutting Edge Roofing for your roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C Andal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ34JtK39odXUf8Xtjsg_NSTLmAat8pTulsslXuXvkh7eZ43Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Completely new roof, QUALITY work, big piece of mind

The roof that the builder installed was nothing but headaches. Every major windstorm meant more shingles blown off, and hundreds of dollars of repair. We finally decided to get a new roof installed, and wow were we happy to go with The Cutting Edge. Jimmy, Rob, and the team were fantastic. They were all professional, friendly, and a breeze to deal with. We verbally committed to going with them last fall, but had more shingles blown off in the meantime. They came without asking to repair the roof, free of charge!!! I don't know any other company that would do that!! The work itself was high quality. We have a complicated roof with lots of peaks. But they got the entire job done in just 2 days, including the removal of the old shingles. The workmanship is top notch, and they left the jobsite clear of debris. Safety is also a concern of theirs, stressing that we called them every time we needed to leave the house while they were working. That way they could ensure no one was hurt. After the job was finished, they sent dozens of photos of the work being done, and the finished product. From the quoting process, to the finished product, I could tell that quality was top of mind in everything they do. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend The Cutting Edge to anyone. Go with them for your roofing needs. You won't regret it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENaS4Mv_6oba4wE&fid=0x0:0xbf1be8308f0cb38a"],"When":"2025-5-13"},{"Name":"William Ng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWA1_XsY1AFXNrjlSSxaCHW_2kE8aQBdWNHPdKylTONuo988jfk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve previously had Rob over a few years ago to do a quick repair due to a raccoon trying to get into my garage. The repair was done without issue but was told that the roof needed to be changed. After saving and trying to stretch existing equipment as long as I could, I called rob back and was able to write up a contract and install two sun tunnels (for an up coming Reno that will restrict the amount of light coming in). Yes those garage shingles were turning to dust LOL. Decided to go with the Owen’s Corning 50 Year Warranty.

This said the day of the install, Rob and his team arrived early and went on their way. Was able to install the sun tunnels without issue and complete the project without leaks (rained the night it was completed).

They even went around the property with a magnet sweep to remove any nails that could have been left on the driveway!  Installed a vent on the garage that should have been there since the start (but wasn’t).

Workmanship is awesome, roof looks beautiful. A little expensive, but with everything, you get what you pay for. I can go to bed comfortably knowing the roof was done right.

Interestingly enough, my next door neighbour had theirs done by them as well more than a decade ago, and theirs is holding up very well too!

Some roofers are shady, but Robs team was professional, upfront and honest!

Sun Tunnels definitely brighten up the upstairs! (Seriously consider them if you are considering installing a skylight! Much cheaper and less prone to leaking).

Definitely would recommend Cutting edge roofing!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH_eT9Sg&fid=0x0:0xbf1be8308f0cb38a"],"When":"2024-9-8"},{"Name":"Ryan Morris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvvlkpBHY0ahfcYGdgOQ1DEGHvHMwKh4iSYxHfepYL_orufSU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 star review for Jimmy and his team at The Cutting Edge.  They quoted a fair price, and went above and beyond to satisfy the customer.  We had our flat roof replaced along with the shingles on our back porch, and the old chimney removed that was no longer venting.  Jimmy walked us through each step, listened to my concerns around drainage and waterproofing and made sure everything drained properly into the gutter and the roof was fully waterproofed.  They fixed our roof vents which had previously been blocked with spray foam, replaced some bad would on the porch roof, and realigned some soffit that an animal had pried apart.

Jimmy provided detailed pictures of each step, so I could see the progress without climbing a ladder.  The new roof looks great and I expect it to get a solid 20+ years out of it :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Palidor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2Jrphf-yJGNO5KCHz4iB0EstzllUO0nH2NheMhyWlFbQ2eg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've had Cutting Edge Roofing service my roof a couple of times in the past, and have always been 100% satisfied with the work and customer service.  That's why when we had a leak in a window and the window company said it's the roof, I called Cutting Edge Roofing right away.
Robert came out the next day, inspected the roof, and determined the source of the leak was likely a gap between the stucco window frame and the roof.  Since he was here, I also asked for the eavestroughs to be cleaned.  Robert also did a complimentary roof tune-up, which was much appreciated.  Highly recommend Robert and Cutting Edge Roofing -- they are the only company I will call when it's time for a new roof.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lorne Preston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0bL3s47M443hUM3aytPd7LzlL7nH_mjgdyu77txrmPa5M-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It has been a very positive experience working with The Cutting Edge Roofing.

When Robert Landry first came to our home in March to give an estimate for roof repairs and shingling, he listened to our concerns and provided valuable insight into what the process might involve when warm Spring weather would allow the work to be done. While here, Robert also noted some ice dams and without prompting went up on the snow covered roof and cleared them at no cost.

The roofing project took Robert, Tyler, and Jimmy about 25 hours to complete. The teams' work ethic, workmanship and attention to detail was truly outstanding; issues found during the process were brought to our attention and addressed. Each day the job site and the area around the house was swept and cleaned to remove even the smallest pieces of debris and roofing nails.

Photographs of the work were provided for our home records; the friendship and professionalism extended to us was greatly appreciated. Without doubt, Robert and his crew earned and deserve the highest recommendation.

Dorie and Lorne Preston","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"oscar s","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNaTtVhm57PwUbmYHh2tuc5FjrDU6UCfjt0d3ZbQKIsZysGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Robert is an amazing roofer that I've know for 15 years. He first installed a new roof when we moved into an older home. Showed up on time, was very thorough and provided a really competitive quote. We were very pleased with the finished product. Many years later we moved to a new house, I called him on two separate occasions to look at potential roof leaks, but after thorough inspections, both times he determined they were the result of plumbing issues. He didn't even want to accept payment, despite him showing up on a weekend. Great honest guy, excellent company, can't recommend him enough!","Images":null,"When":""}]

The Brookstone operation runs smoothly from sales, measurements, and installation teams, to their admin team. The timeline from sales pitch to delivery was within the month, we were kept in the loop and given very detailed directions and information on what was happening and when.

George and his install team arrived and did a meticulous job removing and installing the new windows as well as the indoor trim, they were even able to reuse the trim around our existing sliding glass door. I also noticed that while George was on our roof, he picked off all of the debris (sticks and leaves), I thought that was really sweet.

We are very happy with Brookstone Windows & Doors and would hire them again for future jobs. 👍

Oh, also the sound from outside and the heat we felt from our old windows and doors has virtually disappeared with our new ones! 🙌

Thanks,
Jody and Ted","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCl3cSyB1u3IFUO3akrGDek&fid=0x0:0x87dee5ad06ee9a9a"],"When":"2025-7-30"},{"Name":"Janette Mason","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYphf9SgJYf6DcsGWhVeAeeJlfvPb4oF27kDGLRJLRwcguDHqO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had all of our windows and our sliding door replaced by Brookstone Windows and Doors, and we couldn’t be happier with the results. title: St. Aubin Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kevan Drinkwalter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHKBuUNJh6LBNUPV94iSu4mbwQMW8DuBH-HKh3Y0z1ogIFqX_h=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"By fluke I was introduced to St Aubin Roofing - seeking recos thru social media a number of "numbers" were tossed my way - I called a majority of them and set up six quotes. One contact supplied by a friend I accidentally transposed the last two numbers - oddly enough it put me in contact with another roofing company St Aubin.

Out of the six companies to supply "onsite quotes" they were the only one not thrown off by the style of my home plus the tight quarters of one side with the neighbours. With that - their quote was not "inflated."

Saving thousands of dollars St Aubin was hired and performed the job. Not that price is always a decision maker - it was a no-brainer - they were reasonably priced and didn't utter the phrase "How am I going to do this / that?" ... as a majority of the quoters did.  Seriously, when a roofing company assesses your home and that is their first line to you before a "nice to meet you handshake" even - they eliminate themselves before even ticking the first check box on the clipboard.

I'm really satisfied with the job and the interpersonal skills of all the staff. > five stars <","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE4Miz-QE&fid=0x0:0x9ba8ceabed82c9a4"],"When":"2018-7-19"},{"Name":"Michael Paul Sportun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUa-35ZFhyVGdnWfXQucR9Cf_Gxfav-NuxJ2GiBjAeauE4fMUW69g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

After inspecting our roof, Dave asked to check the attic and quickly uncovered major issues: poor venting, disconnected furnace stack and bathroom fan, and significant mold caused by a previous roofer’s negligence.

We got three quotes — one company didn’t even call, and another ignored our concerns. GEXE’s price was in line with the others, but their attention to detail was on another level.

We’re thrilled with our beautiful new black matte roof (50-year transferable warranty), upgraded venting, insulation, and properly reconnected stack and fan. The cost ran a bit higher due to mold damage, but it was absolutely worth it.

From the very beginning, Tom was incredibly compassionate, hands on, and understanding about the state of our home. He treated us not just like clients, but like family. He kept us informed and engaged through every step, making sure we felt confident about the work being done.

His team was equally amazing:

Dan and Ahmed, who did the flooring, worked with such precision and care that our floors now look better than ever.

Sheldon, who handled the drywall, was efficient, meticulous, and left everything looking seamless.

The entire crew was professional, communicative, and genuinely kind people to have in our home. What could have been a stressful process was instead smooth, efficient, and even uplifting thanks to them. I also do have to say that Dan and Tom are hilarious to be around.

It’s rare to find contractors who combine such skill with such heart. Ontario Contractors Plus went above and beyond for us, and we are so grateful. If you need work done on your home, look no further because this is the team you want by your side.
